info.title: A .NET Core global tool to list outdated Nuget packages.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version
information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --include-auto-references
options.description:
Specifies whether to
include auto-referenced
packages.

options.name: --pre-release
options.description:
Specifies whether to
look for pre-release
versions of packages.
Possible values: Auto
(default), Always or
Never.
Allowed values are:
Auto, Always, Never.
Default value is: Auto.

options.name: --version-lock
options.description:
Specifies whether the
package should be locked
to the current Major or
Minor version. Possible
values: None (default),
Major or Minor.
Allowed values are:
None, Major, Minor.
Default value is: None.

options.name: --transitive
options.description:
Specifies whether it
should detect transitive
dependencies.

options.name: --transitive-depth
options.description:
Defines how many levels
deep transitive
dependencies should be
analyzed. Integer value
(default = 1)
Default value is: 1.

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Specifies whether
outdated packages should
be upgraded. Possible
values for <TYPE> is
Auto (default) or
Prompt.
Allowed values are:
Auto, Prompt.

options.name: --fail-on-updates
options.description:
Specifies whether it
should return a non-zero
exit code when updates
are found.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Specifies to only look
at packages where the
name contains the
provided string. Culture
and case insensitive. If
provided multiple times,
a single match is enough
to include a package.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Specifies to only look
at packages where the
name does not contain
the provided string.
Culture and case
insensitive. If provided
multiple times, a single
match is enough to
exclude a package.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Specifies the filename
for a generated report.
(Use the

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
option to specify the
format. JSON by
default.)

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Specifies the output
format for the generated
report. Possible values:
json (default), csv, or
markdown.
Allowed values are:
Json, Csv, Markdown.
Default value is: Json.

options.name: --older-than
options.description:
Only include package
versions that are older
than the specified
number of days.
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description:
Add the reference
without performing
restore preview and
compatibility check.

options.name: --recursive
options.description:
Recursively search for
all projects within the
provided directory.

options.name: --ignore-failed-sources
options.description:
Treat package source
failures as warnings.

options.name: --include-up-to-date
options.description:
Include all dependencies
in the report even the
ones not outdated.

options.name: --pre-release-label
options.description:
Specifies an optional
label to restrict
matches to when looking
for pre-release versions
of packages. For
example, a label of
'rc.1' would only match
pre-release packages
with a pre-release label
that starts with that
prefix.

options.name: --nuget-cred-log-level
options.description:
Specifies the minimum
level of logs for NuGet
Credential Service.
Possible values: debug,
verbose, information,
warning (default), or
error
Allowed values are:
Debug, Verbose,
Information, Minimal,
Warning, Error.
Default value is:
Warning.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
Specifies an optional
runtime identifier to be
used during the restore
target when projects are
analyzed. More
information available on
https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/rid-catalog

options.name: --maximum-version
options.description:
The inclusive maximum
package version to
upgrade to.For example,
a value of '8.0' would
upgrade System.Text.Json
6.0.0 to the latest
patch version of 8.0.x

options.name: --idle-timeout
options.description:
Specifies the idle
timeout in seconds to
wait for output from the
dotnet executable before
assuming it has hung.
Default is 120 seconds.
Default value is: 120.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description:
Runs the Model Context
Protocol (MCP) server.
Run 'dotnet outdated [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.
